content.text:
Reading clarifications.json and evaluating answers for contradictions...

Found issues:
- Q1: Choice A selected (common workflows) but free-text also requests advanced edge cases with equal priority — self-contradictory
- Q2 vs Q7: Beginner target audience conflicts with request for full working examples with test harnesses
- Q5: Tool-specific organization chosen but no tools named — too vague
- Q8: Unanswered

result: Evaluated 9 questions: 5 clear, 1 empty, 1 vague, 2 contradictory. Verdict: mixed
